## Summary (English)

<!-- What doc(s) and why -->

## Type

- [ ] Fix typo / clarity only
- [ ] New section or doc (must follow `docs/LANGUAGE_POLICY.md`)
- [ ] Diagram / SVG
- [ ] Cross-links / navigation only

## Claim check (if touching benchmarks or frontier comparisons)

- [ ] I read `docs/CLAIM_DISCIPLINE.md` and did not introduce forbidden merges.

## Build

- [ ] `make check` passes (run from repo root of this tree).
